questions.question: In two-pointer technique for sorted array, where start?
questions.explanation: One pointer at smallest, one at largest.

questions.question: Time complexity of two-pointer search in sorted array of size n?
questions.explanation: Each step moves one pointer. Total: O(n).

questions.question: What is slow/fast pointer useful for?
Can two pointers work on unsorted array?
questions.explanation: Sorted is needed for deciding pointer direction.
